subject: FW: Proposed Investment Terms For Managed Account
body:
From: bwjaeger310@aol.com [mailto:bwjaeger310@aol.com] 
Sent: Friday, June 06, 2008 2:06 PM
To: Lesley Groff; Rahna Jalashgar
Subject: Fwd: Proposed Investment Terms For Managed Account

 

Please forward this e-mail to Jeffrey as well as the attached 1 page term sheet. Thank you.


Jeffrey, 

 

It was great to see you on Monday and I am glad to see that you are keeping such a positive attitude. I am sure that you will prevail and make the right decision on how to proceed.

 

Right before Ghislaine entered your office,  you asked me if we could start trading and the answer is yes. The lawyers will allow Duncan and I to trade a managed account and the term sheet for the proposed trade is attached. We are ready to trade with all the necessary infrastructure in place and prime brokerage relationships up and running. We would like to meet with you next week at your convenience and go through the term sheet briefly to make sure we all are on the same page. Thanks again.

 

Best Regards-

 

 

________________________________

Stay informed, get connected and more with AOL on your phone <http://mobile.aol.com/productOverview.jsp?productOverview=aol-mobile-overview&?&ncid=aolmbd00030000000139> .
body_html:
From: bwjaeger310@aol.com [mailto:bwjaeger310@aol.com]
Sent: Friday, June 06, 2008 2:06 PM
To: Lesley Groff; Rahna Jalashgar
Subject: Fwd: Proposed Investment Terms For Managed Account

 

Please forward this e-mail to Jeffrey as well as the attached 1 page term sheet. Thank you.


Jeffrey,

 

It was great to see you on Monday and I am glad to see that you are keeping such a positive attitude. I am sure that you will prevail and make the right decision on how to proceed.

 

Right before Ghislaine entered your office,  you asked me if we could start trading and the answer is yes. The lawyers will allow Duncan and I to trade a managed account and the term sheet for the proposed trade is attached. We are ready to trade with all the necessary infrastructure in place and prime brokerage relationships up and running. We would like to meet with you next week at your convenience and go through the term sheet briefly to make sure we all are on the same page. Thanks again.

 

Best Regards-
